en.extract:
The Malaita owl (Athene malaitae), also known as the Malaita boobook, is a small to medium-sized owl. It is endemic to Malaita. It was formerly considered a subspecies of the Solomons boobook.

The '''Malaita owl''' ('''''Athene malaitae'''''), also known as the '''Malaita boobook''', is a small to medium-sized owl. It is endemic to [[Malaita]]. It was formerly considered a subspecies of the [[Solomons boobook]].<ref>{{Cite web |title=Species Updates – IOC World Bird List |url=https://www.worldbirdnames.org/new/updates/species-updates/ |access-date=18 June 2021 |language=en-US}}</ref>
